{{Quote|It wouldn't have happened if George Lucas didn't like radio. That's why it happened.|Voegeli, on the ''Star Wars'' radio adaptations|<ref name="SWI" />}}

'''Tom Voegeli''' is an audio producer. He was responsible for the post-production of all three [[Star Wars radio dramas|''Star Wars'' radio dramas]] ([[Star Wars (radio)|''Star Wars'']], [[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|''The Empire Strikes Back'']], and [[Return of the Jedi (radio)|''Return of the Jedi'']]).<ref name="SW">[[Star Wars (radio)|''Star Wars'' (radio)]]</ref> For ''The Empire Strikes Back,'' Voegli was also credited as a co-director.<ref name="ESB">[[The Empire Strikes Back (radio)|''The Empire Strikes Back'' (radio)]]</ref> For ''Return of the Jedi'' he was the producer, with his company Tom Voegeli Productions.<ref name="ROTJ">[[Return of the Jedi (radio)|''Return of the Jedi'' (radio]]</ref> 

Voegeli went on to produce the [[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|''Dark Forces'' audio dramatizations]]<ref name="Dark Forces">[[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|''Dark Forces'' audio dramas]]</ref> and the [[1998]] [[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|audio dramatization of ''Crimson Empire'']].<ref name="Crimson">[[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|''Crimson Empire'' (audio)]]</ref>
